# Code of Conduct

BlackPanda Labs aims to be a respectful, beginner-friendly open-source community.

## Expected Behavior

- Be respectful and constructive.
- Welcome beginners and explain concepts clearly.
- Keep discussions focused on authorized security learning, secure development and controlled lab work.
- Credit contributors fairly.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment, threats or discrimination.
- Unauthorized testing of third-party systems.
- Sharing stolen data, credentials, private keys or secrets.
- Spam, impersonation or misleading claims.
- Requests for private access, admin access or production credentials.

Maintainers may moderate community spaces to protect contributors and keep projects safe.
